name: Room No.420
overview: Yash and Pooja are a newly wed couple who are off to their honeymoon. Another couple, Shweta & Rishi arrive at the same resort. Will there be a connection between these people? The tangle of relationships, true love, the journey of the difference between illusion and reality is Room No. 420.

trailers.title: Room No 420 | Trailer | Alisha Prajapati | Ravi Gohil | New Gujarati We Series | Coming soon
